en: At 24 you decided you were gonna do comedy and so you made it work with the
ko: 24살에 코미디를 하기로 결심했지, 그래서 군대에서 잘 해냈어.

en: military but at the same time you wanted to be on SNL and you had like set this goal to be on SNL and then you
ko: 하지만 동시에 SNL에 출연하고 싶었고 그 목표를 세웠어.

en: did it like at like the 10 year mark or something right Yeah yeah It was well I was in flight school and
ko: 그리고 10년쯤 지나서 그걸 이뤘지, 맞지? 응, 맞아.

en: I'll try to give you the Reader's Digest version of this story because it's long but matter of fact it's right here in this book everybody
ko: 비행학교에 있었고 이 이야기를 간단히 말해줄게, 길어서.

en: Oh Yeah Yeah Yeah Yeah Yeah Just just shameless
ko: 사실 이 책에 다 있어.

en: shameless No but it is convenient to have it right here It is very nice to have it right it's so good No I was
ko: 오, 응, 응, 응, 응, 응, 부끄럽지 않아.

en: in the again Reader's Digest version I was in the Marine Corps I was flying planes down to Corpus Christi Texas I had a friend of
ko: 부끄럽지 않아, 근데 여기 있는 게 편하긴 해.

en: mine who was up in Chicago doing improv and he said Riggle this is what we did in college only it has a name it's called improv
ko: 정말 좋지, 여기 있는 게 좋았어.

en: and I think you're good at it I think you're better than some of the people up here Well that's exactly what I needed to hear at that moment because flight school
ko: 다시 말해서, 나는 해병대에 있었고 비행기를 타고 텍사스 코퍼스 크리스티로 갔어.

en: was fine but I wasn't loving it it was just fine and once I pinned those wings on I was in for 10 years I
ko: 시카고에서 즉흥 공연을 하는 친구가 있었는데, 그 친구가 말했어.

en: was locked in Then I figured out oh my God I'll probably do 20 at that point why would I get out at such a ah so all of a sudden I
ko: 리글, 이건 우리가 대학에서 했던 거야. 이름이 있어, 즉흥 공연이라고.

en: was like that's happening you know well
ko: 너 잘할 것 같아, 여기 있는 사람들보다 더 잘할 것 같아.

en: I sat down and had my quarter life crisis as they call it and I said what do I really really want to do with my
ko: 그 말을 듣고 정말 필요했어. 비행학교는 괜찮았지만 사랑하지는 않았어.

en: life and I said I think I want to be a comedian Now mind you I had never done anything comedically I know no one in the
ko: 그냥 괜찮았고, 날개를 달고 10년 동안 묶여 있었어.

en: business I'd never been on stage I'd never really done anything but I just had this burning desire to do it so
ko: 그때 아, 20년은 할 것 같다는 생각이 들었어.

en: I quit flight school went to the ground side on the Marines which allowed me to fulfill my
ko: 갑자기 그게 현실이 되는 거야.

en: contract with the Marines and then moved to Chicago and I ended up getting to New York
ko: 그래서 앉아서 25세의 위기를 겪었어.

en: taking classes
ko: 내 인생에서 정말 하고 싶은 게 뭘까 생각했지.

en: working seven years grinding at every place around town any place I could get stage time studying with
ko: 코미디언이 되고 싶다고 말했어.

en: the UCB all these things ended up deploying going to Kosovo ended up going to Afghanistan working
ko: 사실 나는 코미디를 해본 적이 없었고, 업계에 아는 사람도 없었어.

en: on 9 11 down in the rubble piles ended up doing a bunch of things and sure enough 10 years almost to the
ko: 무대에 서본 적도 없고, 정말 아무것도 해본 적이 없었어.

en: day that I wrote down in the book this book I was reading at the time I wrote down in the book if I quit flight school I'm going
ko: 그런데 그걸 하고 싶다는 강한 열망이 있었어.

en: to do what Number one get on SNL Almost 10 years to the day that I wrote that I got a call from
ko: 그래서 비행학교를 그만두고 해병대의 지상 부대로 갔어.

en: Lorne Michaels asking me to join SNL
ko: 그렇게 계약을 이행하고 시카고로 이사했지.
